authors.author: Mark Hall
Mark Hall
Im Sturm sing ich zu dir

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v3 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I was sure by now God You would have reached down And wiped our tears away Stepped in and saved the day But once again, I say Amen, And it's still raining

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: As the thunder rolls I barely hear Your whisper through the rain I'm with you And as Your mercy falls I raise my hands and praise the God who gives And takes away

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And I'll praise You in this storm And I will lift my hands For You are who You are No matter where I am And every tear I've cried You hold in Your hand You never left my side And though my heart is torn I will praise You in this storm

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And I remember when I stumbled in the wind You heard my cry to you And you raised me up again My strength is almost gone How can I carry on If I can't find You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: But as the thunder rolls I barely hear You whisper through the rain I'm with you And as Your mercy falls I raise my hands and praise the God who gives And takes away

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: /: I lift my eyes unto the hills Where does my help come from? My help comes from the Lord The Maker of Heaven and Earth :/

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: And though my heart is torn I will praise You in this storm
